channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Godzilla vs GTA 6: Retro Remake Makes PlayStation Debut on PS5 This November
item.description: Godzilla: Destroy All Monsters Melee Remastered launches on PS5 November 3 for $29.99. The game is powered by Unreal Engine 5.

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2 - Year One: The Digital Foundry Verdict
item.description: Digital Foundry reviews the first year of Nintendo Switch 2, highlighting significant improvements and future potential. The console shows promise for gamers.

item.title: Stellar Blade Blood Rain Trailer Reveal Is Raising AI Alarm Bells
item.description: The reveal trailer for Stellar Blade: Blood Rain has sparked concerns over AI-generated content quality. Critics label it as 'AI slop'.

item.title: One Of 2025's Best Games Is Getting A 'Nintendo Switch 2 Edition' This Month
item.description: A popular game from 2025 is receiving a Nintendo Switch 2 edition this month, reigniting excitement among fans. The trend continues with new editions.

item.title: Monster Hunter Wilds Is So Back With Big Ascendance Expansion
item.description: Capcom announces the Ascendance expansion for Monster Hunter Wilds, featuring Elder Dragons and new gameplay elements. The expansion is set for 2027.

item.title: New ChatGPT Lockdown Mode Limits Tools That Could Enable Data Exfiltration
item.description: OpenAI introduces Lockdown Mode for ChatGPT to mitigate data exfiltration risks. This feature restricts certain outbound requests.

item.title: You can choose to resurrect Bosch in Street Fighter 6's World Tour mode
item.description: Street Fighter 6 reveals Bosch as a new character in Season 4 DLC, allowing players to resurrect him in World Tour mode. Excitement builds for the DLC.

item.title: Super Yooka-Laylee Kart announced, first details and trailer
item.description: Playtonic announces Super Yooka-Laylee Kart, set for PC with potential Switch 2 release. The game promises exciting new features and gameplay.

item.title: iOS 27 beta release date: When you can install the new iPhone update
item.description: The iOS 27 beta is set to launch soon, allowing users to install pre-release software on their iPhones. Anticipation builds for new features.

item.title: HP and Ferrari launch $5,599 AI PC limited to 4,999 units
item.description: HP and Ferrari unveil a limited edition AI PC priced at $5,599, with only 4,999 units available across nine countries. The laptop features high-end specifications.
